ratings.comment: David is an amazing professor who simplified really complex material. Although his exam was the hardest out of the 3, it involved relatively little memorization and focused more on application. The in-class demos were useful, and lectures were light. Office hours were helpful for understanding potential exam questions, and he brought cookies!

Exams based on lectures so reading textbook is optional. He is a nice guy and does a decent job of teaching the material, which can be kind of hard depending on your background (if you have learned similar material in other classes youll be fine). However, his exams had all of the above and select all that apply questions, which i personally hate.
